finding_results.notes: The middle sequence now escalates by distinct function. Mrs. Rusk demonstrates unstable cooking heat, Bess turns the second stop into a trade-specific test where Silas misreads mourning trim and is made to block the lamp with his own body, and the Nora/Ettie room still converts the pressure into immediate bodily injury.
